upload.title: Upload Inspection Files
upload.description: Upload Excel inspection form files. The system will auto-detect form types and verify against specifications.
upload.dropzoneHint: or click to browse · .xlsx format · multiple files supported
upload.processing: Parsing files and verifying against specs...
upload.resultDesc: Below are the inspection results. Download individually or in batch.
upload.featureAutoDetectDesc: Automatically identifies 5 standard inspection form types by filename and content
upload.featureSpecMatchDesc: Forms with specs are auto-judged OK/NG for each inspection value
upload.featureBatchDesc: Upload multiple files at once, each parsed and judged individually

history.title: Inspection History
history.deleteBatchConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this batch? This will remove {{count}} files and {{sheets}} sheets of inspection results. This cannot be undone.

specs.title: Spec Management
specs.description: Manage inspection specifications for each form type. Changes will affect future upload judgments.
specs.noSpecs: No specs configured for this form type
specs.noSpecsHint: Click "Add Spec Group" or "Import from Excel" to create specs
specs.addGroupDesc: Create an empty spec group, then manually edit inspection items
specs.importExcelDesc: Upload an Excel with a summary sheet to auto-import spec items
specs.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete spec group "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone. All inspection items will be deleted.
specs.guideAutoImportDesc: System reads spec values from the summary sheet and auto-creates inspection items
specs.guideManualSetupDesc: System cannot auto-detect specs. Manually add items or import a file with a summary sheet
specs.guideStep1Desc: Each type corresponds to an Excel format. Supports standard and custom types.
specs.guideStep2Desc: Upload an Excel file with a summary sheet to auto-import specs, or manually add spec groups.
specs.guideStep3Desc: Click a spec group to configure each item's specification values (range, threshold, etc.).
specs.addFormTypeDesc: Create a new form type and set file matching rules. The system will auto-identify uploaded files based on these rules.
specs.addFormTypeUploadDesc: Upload a sample Excel file. The system will analyze its structure and create form type with spec groups automatically.
specs.uploadSampleFile: Drop or click to select a sample Excel file
specs.uploadSampleHint: The system will analyze file structure and auto-create equipment spec groups and inspection items
specs.detectedEquipment: Detected Equipment (will be created as spec groups)
specs.createFromFileHint: Each sheet will become a spec group. Spec items will be imported from the summary sheet.
specs.createNoSummaryHint: Each sheet will become an empty spec group. You will need to manually configure inspection items or import a file with a summary sheet later.
specs.fileMatchesExisting: This file matches an existing form type
specs.fileMatchesExistingDesc: This file was identified as "{{code}}". Consider using the existing type instead of creating a duplicate.
specs.noSummarySheetDesc: This file does not contain a summary sheet. Only empty spec groups will be created. You will need to manually set up specs or import a file with a summary sheet later.
specs.editFormTypeDesc: Modify the form name or file matching rules
specs.formCodeDuplicate: This form type code already exists. Please use a different code.
specs.filePatternHint: Enter a keyword or regex to match uploaded filenames
specs.builtInWarning: This is a built-in type. Deleting it will prevent automatic identification of this format.
specs.confirmDeleteFormType: Are you sure you want to delete form type "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone. All related specs will be deleted.
specs.isDuplicate: This file has been imported before
specs.aiParserNote: This spec was parsed by AI. Please review carefully before importing.
specs.noSpecsParsed: No specs could be parsed from the summary sheet
specs.rollbackConfirmMessage: Restore specs to version {{n}} ({{count}} items). The current state will be saved as a new version. Continue?

specDetail.itemNameHint: Matches the Excel column header name. The system uses this to match columns in uploaded files.
specDetail.groupHint: Category for grouping inspection items, e.g. "Parameters", "Mold Temp"
specDetail.subGroupHint: Distinguishes the same item across different positions, e.g. "Upper Mold", "Lower Mold"
specDetail.typeHint: Judgment rule type: Range (min~max), Check (symbol match), Text (exact match), Threshold (comparison)
specDetail.specValueHint: The judgment criteria based on the type. Uploaded values are compared against this spec.
specDetail.noItemsHint: Click "Add Item" to add inspection items

table.noSpecWarning: No spec configured for this sheet. Showing raw data.
